title: astragalus robbinsii var. alpiniformis
intro: Astragalus robbinsii var. alpiniformis, also known as alpine milkvetch, is a perennial legume plant native to the mountainous regions of North America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its adaptogenic and anti-inflammatory compounds, which are said to boost the immune system and reduce stress. Alpine milkvetch has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues, digestive problems, and skin conditions, due to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. Herbal preparations of alpine milkvetch include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which are often used to enhance overall health and well-being.
